title: New Game 2
description: Enjoy an enhanced version of New Game with more challenges and exciting adventures!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Game_2/BH_NG2_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/new-game-2) version.** ## Enjoy an adventure WITHOUT LIMITS, with infinite challenges and objectives, hundreds of biomes, structures, animals and enemies. Basically, endless possibilities, but always being faithful to the essence of New Game. At all times you will know that you are playing MINECRAFT, it is not like many other modpacks that change the games so radically that they seem like another game. No, New Game always tries to be faithful to the vanilla essence, the one that made the Minecraft community fall in love with it. But do not think that being faithful to Minecraft adds little content, on the contrary, incorporates more than 300 impressive mods, which will be responsible for improving absolutely all areas of the game. From exploration, to combat or survival itself, and best of all, it is ideal to play with your friends! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Game_2/BH_NG2_banner2.webp) Live a completely renewed experience with the second edition of New Game! Remaining true to the vanilla experience, New Game completely expands all areas of the game, adding a lot of mods aimed at expanding the gameplay possibilities. ⌨️ Immerse yourself in the game thanks to mods such as AmbientSounds, Falling Leaves or Serene Seasons. 💍 Get a family and take care of it with the famous MCA Reborn. 🏔️ Discover and explore exciting biomes, in all Minecraft dimensions, thanks to Biomes O' Plenty, Regions Unexplored or Alex's Caves. 🏚️ Enter into new dungeons and structures, through the famous Additional Structures, Medieval Buildings or the classic YUNG's Mods. 🐘 Get to know new animals and investigate the fauna of each of the biomes, all thanks to the mythical Alex's Mobs or Aquaculture 2, among many others. 🐉 Ready to fight? Thousands of battles against new enemies await you, including Ice and Fire dragons or L_Ender's Cataclysm bosses. 🌠 You will discover new dimensions, such as The Aether or The Twilight Forest, the most beloved of Minecraft! 🤼 Play with friends! New Game 2 is a perfect modpack for multiplayer, and therefore, we have added mods such as Simple Voice Chat, PlayerRevive or Emotecraft, among many other options to enjoy the experience. 🤩 And much more! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Game_2/BH_NG2_banner1.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 8GB or 8192 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 8GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Game_2/BH_NG2_banner3.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wDFguC7g/images/f8243f569ad7e8ecff0c5f6e9d8da7451d6d19e6.jpeg) ![Screemsjpts 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wDFguC7g/images/a00c2a6506dae1636accc9bcbed19ca80f02ce85.jpeg) ![Screemsjpts 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wDFguC7g/images/4351e64ba26821b6d53d0aa5b248fa6fd65821bd.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
